articles.description: Nottingham Forest continue their remarkable Europa League run - but does it only increase the pressure on staying in the Premier League?
articles.title: Nottingham Forest: Champions League in the Championship - could Forest tackle both next season?

articles.description: With speculation continuing over LIV Golf's future, BBC Sport analyses whether the breakaway tour will continue.
articles.title: LIV Golf: Is this the beginning of the end for the breakaway tour?

articles.description: Ten years ago, Aston Villa were relegated to English football's second tier for the first time since 1987. Now they are in their second European semi-final in three seasons.
articles.title: Aston Villa: How Unai Emery turned spectacular European nights into Villa's new normal

articles.description: After overcoming Fiorentina over two legs to reach the semi-finals, Crystal Palace will now fancy their chances of going all the way in the Conference League and adding a European trophy to their FA Cup success last season.
articles.title: Crystal Palace: Why Eagles and Conference League are a good fit

articles.description: Los Angeles Lakers' Luka Doncic and Detroit Pistons' Cade Cunningham are eligible to win NBA end-of-season awards after successful appeals.
articles.title: NBA awards: Luka Doncic and Cade Cunningham eligible after appeal

articles.description: Former Arsenal goalkeeper Alex Manninger dies at the age of 48 after his car is struck by a train.
articles.title: Alex Manninger: Ex-Arsenal goalkeeper dies after car hit by train

articles.description: Andrew Benson assesses how much money is needed to reach Formula 1 and why costs have increased so much.
articles.title: F1: Do you have to be a millionaire to make it to the top of the sport?

articles.description: Ashley Cole won 107 caps for England, seventh on the all‑time list, but says he was "discouraged" by those in the football pyramid from becoming a head coach.
articles.title: Ashley Cole: 'Italy made me a manager when England discouraged me'

articles.description: Argentina World Cup winner Lionel Messi becomes the new owner of Catalan club Cornella.
articles.title: Lionel Messi becomes new owner of Catalan club Cornella

articles.description: Jonny Clayton delights the Rotterdam crowd as he beats Luke Littler 6-4 to extend his lead at the top of the Premier League table.
articles.title: Premier League Darts 2026 results: Jonny Clayton beats Luke Littler to secure fourth nightly win
